author: @Teknopottu
text:
Great stuff! I've been pondering for years on and off if something like this would work and you put it to work! Spend many hours and demonstrated the fruit in a nice package lasting bit more than a fiver.

Remember, people can learn more from their mistakes than from plain success so don't feel bad if there was some difficulties. You should be proud! 

If there is some material from the failed stages and other hiccups, I bet many would love to see some of them! One can also learn from other peoples' mistakes so that one doesn't have to make all of them themself :)
